figures.caption: TABLE I. Gate counts per oracle in each Grover search of GAS applied to quadratic, quartic, and high-degree binary programmings with fixed-cardinality constraint in addition to O(m logm) Toffoli gates for inverse QFT. QD-GAS is short for the quantum dictionary oracle based GAS, and ADMM-GAS-hard is the ADMM-based hybrid GAS approach for hard-constrained programmings.
FIG. 1. The circuit of ŜCS (n) 2 and ŜCS (n,t) 3 for ŜCSn,l unitary: (a) ŜCS (n) 2 , (b) ŜCS (n,t) 3 .
